resources.string: "Bookmark segments you want to compete to add them to My Segment. "

Bryton Acitve would like to access BLE. Select to allow Bryton Active to search and connect with BLE accessories. To ensure Bryton Acitve can successfully connect, please make sure your BLE device is awaken and nearby.
Long press to drag the waypoint to adjust the sequence.
You can change the transportation type when planning each part of the route
You can also change the transportation type of each part of the planned route in detail section.
"Move the map to search for locations, then press '+' to add the selected location."
You can check the status of each segment in My segments when the device is connected via BLE
Your changes have not been saved. If you leave, all the changes will be lost.
The training workout description may be slightly adjusted for display on the Bryton device.
Login failed %s times, please try again later in %s mins.
Too many failed login attempts. Please try again in %s mins.
Your password must be at least 8 characters long and include a lowercase letter, an uppercase letter, and a number.
Please unselect some segments to add new ones.
Press 「Redo」button to reverse your undone action. You can redo only after you undo an action.
This segment will be removed from My Segment only. You will no longer be able to compete this segment on device lively.
Unmark the segments to remove the segments from My Segments and the device.
Press Save to save the route once finishing the planning
This segment is downloaded and the data is up-to-date.
The segment data is out-of-date. Click to update the data of this segment.
Click to download this segment to compete on deivce.
You can see all your starred segments on STRAVA here after enabling STRAVA Sync authorization
All bookmarked segments will be listed here.
Click STRAVA and follow the instructions to authorize STRAVA sychronization
Click to sync all segments in My Segments to the device.
Bryton Active syncs your account profile to ensure the accuracy and consistency of your ridelogs when analyzing them.
Press「Undo」button to cancel your last action, rolling back to the previous status
"This workout has more than 80 steps. It's not supported on Bryton devices."
Uploading your activities from the device. This process continues when the app is running in the background.
This workout has no training details
Mark segments to compete on devices
This gpx file contains too many points.

"In order to complete the registeration process, please check your inbox and click on the link in the email we have just sent you. If it is not there, please check the spam folder and meanwile make sure you're checking the correct email account."
Something went wrong during the transfer. Please make sure the device is nearby, powered on and connected to your phone.
All activities have been successfully synced with the Active app and will be uploaded to the Bryton cloud. Please make sure you have a stable network connection.
All activities have been successfully synchronized to the Bryton cloud. You can now view your activities.
Tap to add a new quick reply
Are you sure you want to add to Favorites?
This email already exists. Please try a different email address to register, or login with your existing account.
The route is failed to be sent due to some reasons, please try again later.
Please make sure the compatible device is connected and try again.
Tailor the zone name to make it more relevant based on your fitness goals or training programs.
Download the latest firmware to enhance your riding experience
The route is created and available in My Route.
Your account password has been changed successfully.
The route has been sent to device successfully. You can find the route placed in My Route on your Rider device.
The email address has been registered.
Bryton Active transmits personal info (only name and image) and messages to our server for Group Ride and chat when the app is in use
Bryton Active transmits Message data to paired devices for Smart Notification when the app is in use .
Do you want to save the data page configuration and sync it to the device?
When enabled, the Live Track link will be valid for other new activities if started within 24 hours of the last activity ends.
The LiveTrack sharing session link will be automatically sent to a designated added via email. Press “Auto Send” to configure.
Something wrong with Bluetooth connection. Please go to Bluetooth settings on your phone to forget your device. Then switch the Bluetooth of your phone off and on to pair the device again.
Did not fully follow my request
Are you sure you want to delete this climb?
It would take some time to finish the update.
I am under the age of 20
Are you sure you want to delete from Favorites?
Please make sure the device is paired and powered on before starting the Group Ride.
Please start the Group Ride on your device.

Run in Background enables the transmission of data between the Bryton Active App and Bryton device to function while the app is minimized. Disabling Run in Background will cause some data transmission functions to operate abnormally.
Do you really want to delete Bryton account?

If you delete your Bryton account: All of your date you created such as activities, routes, workouts, settings will be permanently deleted. Only the data you’ve synced/shared to to be 3rd party platforms may remain.
It you change your mind, you’re always welcomed to come back and sign up a new account with us.
You’ve to enter your password to execute Account Deletion.
After you submit your request, we will disable your account and you’ll be log out immediately.
Please note that the Account Deletion is irreversible.
I’ve read above statement clear and still want to delete my account
Do not leave an answer blank
If you don’t received the email, please make sure the provided email address is correct and check the spam folder.
The group is invalid and cannot be opened.
Please stop the Group Ride before updating the firmware.
End Live Track? The Live Track link will be invalid and your location will not be shared.
Enter the email address, we will send you an email with instructions to reset your password
Allow Active to run in background
Since the navigation requires a connection to the Bryton Active app, the app will need to remain running in the background while navigating.
Because each phone brand is slightly different, we can not list every possibility, however, most are similar. Please see the reference below:
App Info > Battery usage > Allow background activity
If you stop data sync, it may cause some errors.
Bryton Active app wants to access your location all the time, please select “Allow all the time“ for location access.
"Bryton Active app currently can access location only while you're using the app. Please select “Allow all the time“ for location access for running stably."
Bryton Active app wants to access your location for running stably.
Please select “Allow all the time“ for location access
Please allow Bryton Active to access your location
You can find the saved locations in My Favorites”.
Tap ... on the top right corner on group ride page and find Download Routes to Device to redownload the Group Ride.
Group Ride has started, get ready to join the ride!
Group Ride has started, please pair the device to start the ride.
Group Ride will start in 15 mins
The group has reached the maximum number of members, join in next time!
What did you encounter? Share your experience with us!
Invalid group code. Please try again.
Jot down something about your group to the group members you invite!
"You're invited to join a Group Ride!"
"Join the ride to see member's location on the map!"
You can only share with up to 5 people
As of 0921, 2020, Bryton has removed the Facebook and Strava 3 rd party login options from Bryton Active.
After careful consideration, this decision was made in order to avoid confusion and prevent ride data loss from forgotten passwords and login confusion.

You can no longer login to the Bryton Active app via the “login with Facebook“ option. This is because, in a recent update, Facebook has removed support for FB Login authentication on Android embedded browsers. To solve this issue, please visit
If you used the Login with Facebook or Strava option for your Bryton Active account, please visit:

on your PC. After logging in with your Facebook account, you will be able to add an email address to your original account. Once the email address is verified, you will be able to login/access your account via the email address you added.
to add an email login for your account. After the email has been added, you can log in to Bryton Active using these credentials with a more stable and faster experience.
Thank you for your patience and enjoy your rides!
*IMPORTANT: The rides and data from your account will NOT be lost.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.
Please enter an email address for Bryton Active login.
A verification has been sent to your email. Please follow the link in the email to continue. If the email does not appear after a few minutes, please check your SPAM folder.

An account already exists for this email address. If you would like to merge your third-party account with this account, please use this email address to send an email to %s including user ID on this web page. We will then merge the data for you.
Please enter new password. This will be your login password in the future.
This data is only for data calculation, such as calories, heart rate, and power for your activity recorded by Bryton devices. Don’t worry! We will not sell your data.
Account has already been taken, please use a different email.
I already have a Bryton account from brytonsport.com or Bryton Sports app, and I would like Bryton to transfer my tracks here.
Failed to transfer activity to route.
Select above interval type to add interval.
To add this workout to your device, please use Data Sync function
Click “Plan Trip” to create a trip
"Add a new device to your account by pressing '+'."
Something went wrong and this chat cannot continue. Please start a new chat.
The conversation has ended due to 10 minutes of inactivity. Please click “New Chat to start over.
"Bryton Active needs permission for 'Alarms and Reminders' to notify you right before the Group Ride starts."
Please uninstall the previous version of Bryton Active to avoid any future confusion.
Your APP is up to date.
Attach some related media to help us understand and pinpoint the issue quickly, saving your valuable time.
You’ve enabled %s Auto Sync feature for the following:
To transfer activities automatically, please activate Auto Transfer function.
the activities on the Bryton Active app will be automatically synced to %s.
The device will automatically jump to Climb Page when approaching a climb section.
*Please be aware that only future activities will be synchronized to Komoot and that only routes in unlocked regions will be synchronized to the Bryton Active.
*Please be aware that only future activities will be synchronized automatically.
*Please be aware that only future activities and workouts within the next 7 days will be synchronized automatically.
*Please be aware that only future activities on the Bryton Active app will be automatically synchronized to %s
*Please be aware that only routes with public visibility will be synchronized.
To enable proper functionality, please set the battery to \"unrestricted\"
Birthday can not be a future date.
Bluetooth connection failed please reset the bike computer or reopen the Bluetooth again
Bluetooth connection failed. Please switch the Bluetooth of your phone off and on then try again.
Bluetooth connection failed please reset the bike computer
Please make sure your Bluetooth is working.
Download Failed. Unable to download the FIT file, please try again later.
Would you like to add this UUID to your Bryton account for future sync?
Downloading Trips failed, please reboot your GPS device.
The new firmware has been downloaded to the device. Tap ”Done” to safely eject the cable and update the device.
"The new firmware has been downloaded to the device. Tap 'Done' to update the device."
To enhance stability and convenience of Bluetooth transfers, please pair GPS device with Bryton Active App again
Please make sure your Bryton device is in Bluetooth pairing mode. Settings > General > Bluetooth.
Turn on your Bryton device and keep away from other BLE devices. When lists shows your pairing device, please tap it to complete pairing.
Your upload has stopped. Would you like to reconnect?
Something wrong with Bluetooth connection. Please go to Bluetooth settings on your phone to forget your device. Then switch the Bluetooth of your phone off and on to pair the device again.
Stop your current upload and rescan?
Enable USB OTG setting on your phone. Connect your phone with your Bryton device via USB cable. Select the ”BRYTON” folder to grant Bryton Active app permission to access the device.
Map download failed. Please make sure the smartphone is connected to the pairing device via cable and try again.
Please connect the device with a USB cable to download maps.
Please retry, select the “BRYTON” root folder to get the authorization.
Would you like to calibrate altitude data for the above device?
Your account password has been successfully changed.
Removing synced activities from the device will improve sync speed.

Bryton Active needs your location data to determine the navigation starting point while the device is unable to provide location data even the app is running in the background. Please allow the app to access your location.
Turn on Bluetooth on phone and GPS devices
Connect to a compatible Bryton device to sync your workout schedule.
Bryton Active requires Nearby Devices or Location permission to fully connect to your Bryton device and enable all features.
Bryton Active App is now seamlessly connected with your %s account.
Connect your smartphone to the Bryton Rider device via USB cable for map download and installation.
Please contact support@brytoncorp.net and request your transfer with the above account information.
Our team typically responds via email within few business days. Please kindly noted.
You are creating a new Bryton account for Bryton Active App using %s.
Your previously uploaded FIT tracks will also be transferred from your brytonsport.com / bryton sports app account under %s.
Tap on the map or search the place to navigate to.
Tap on the map or search to add waypoints to the route.
Do you want to set up data pages manually?
Choose your data page display mode
Decode Failed. Please try again later.
To delete this workout on your device, please use Data Sync function.
Failed to delete some files, please try again.
Remove the following UUID from your account: %s
Are you sure you want to delete the map from device?
Ready for your workout? Write down some notes.
"We're currently busy handling some tasks, some features are temporarily unavailable. Please wait and try again a few seconds later."
"Your GPS device or firmware version doesn't support this function."
The connected Bryton device does not support the Workout function.
This device is recording. Please stop it before further operation.
Bryton Active App needs access to your location. Please turn on Location Services in your device settings.
According to Privacy Policy, we need your permission to obtain your data. If you disagree with this policy, please immediately discontinue using the app.

According to Privacy Policy, we need your permission to obtain your data. If you disagree with this policy, please immediately discontinue using the app. We won’t use your data until you agree with this policy. You can make changes to your privacy policy at any time. If you have any questions, concerns or comments about Bryton Privacy Policy, please email to support@brytonsport.com
It may take a few minutes to download the map. Please stay on the current page while downloading.
The selected new map has been downloaded to the device successfully. Please unplug the cable safely to complete the process.
Download the latest firmware to your Rider device via connection of Bluetooth or cable. Before initiating the firmware update on your Rider device, please ensure it’s charged to at least 50%.
Downloading new update for Bryton Active App.
It may take a few minutes to download the map. Please keep network connection stable and stay on current page until the update process is complete.
Thank you for reaching out! If you need further assistance, please click the link below to connect with our support team via email.
No ride activities. Record a new ride on your Rider device and sync activities to Active.
Enable %s Auto Sync to start your setup!
Enjoy the convenience of effortless data sharing!
Please enter a valid email address.
Parsing error. Something wrong with the file.
The map could not be downloaded because of an unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
Please open the app to view details.
檔案上傳失敗或重複上傳，請到通知頁查看相關訊息

A NEW Firmware update of your Bryton GPS computer is available now. You may use Bryton Update Tool to update via computer(Models: All), or you may use WLAN connection and update it from your device(Models: Aero 60, Rider 450, Rider 530, Rider 330). Learn about HOW below.
Please click the following link to set your new password:
Select Cancel in Bryton device to cancel downloading new firmware.
Unable to obtain current location, please make sure location services on your phone are turned on and go outside for a better GPS reception.
复制邀请码，打开百锐腾App的Group Ride输入后加入群骑
Be sure to send the group ride to a compatible Bryton device to get ready for the event!
Device not connected. Connect to the compatible device to share your riding data to the group members.
The group has reached the maximum number of members, join in next time!
The group cannot be opened because it has expired.
Unable to get current time, please go outside to try again.
Training plan already exists on selected date.
How would you like to pair your device with Bryton Active App?
Please make sure you are at ground level for more accurate altitude calibration.
Tell us what happened, such as a sync error with Strava or data missing after your ride.
Tell us more, e.g., a frozen screen or data failing to upload after a ride.
"Tell us what happened? Device model: S810 My screen froze during the ride, and my data didn’t update when I finished. "
"Please enter the 16 digit device UUID number located on the back of your device. Then press '+' to add it to your account."
Please enter a valid value from %s.
"You haven't unlock this region yet. Go to komoot.com to unlock it."
Any activities you upload to the Bryton Active App or routes on Komoot will automatically sync within minutes.
Enable Komoot Sync for first time setup.
Your Bryton Active App works seamlessly with Komoot; any activities you plan on Komoot can be synced with Bryton devices automatically after quick setup.
LiveTrack session creation failed. Try again?
You can now use the LEFT key on device to mark laps during your rides.
You can now use the LEFT key on device to scroll page during your rides.

We do not sync downhill segments to devices for Strava Live Segments. Please keep in mind that our system recognizes even the slightest negative grade so there may be segments that display a 0% grade that is considered downhill and therefore will not sync to devices.
I just started a ride with Bryton Live Track!
See the real-time update of my location and ride stats!
Your friend just started a ride with Bryton Live Track!
See the real-time update of his/her location and ride stats!
Failed to load contents, please try again later.
Location Service must first be enabled before scanning for Bluetooth. In order to successfully pair your device, please ensure Location Service is enabled.
Incorrect username or password. Please try again.
Long press to drag the waypoint to adjust the sequence.
Type some greetings here for the friends receiving the live track link of your riding data via email!
Your activation link has expired. To Re-Send to %s, please press the button below.

A confirmation link has been set to %s. Please click the link in the email to complete registration. If you have not received the email, please check the Spam folder and confirm that the provided email address is correct. If the problem continues, please contact our customer service mailbox: support@brytonsport.com and someone will assist you.
Please click the link in the email to complete registration. If you have not received the email, please check the spam folder and confirm that the provided email address is correct.
Please visit Bryton Support for further assistance
Your Bryton account email is confirmed. You can now enjoy Bryton Active App and brytonactive.com for post workout analysis.
The map storage is full. Please free up space by deleting unnecessary maps.
The map has been downloaded to the device. Tap ”Done” to safely eject the cable and update the device.
The map has been downloaded to the device. Tap ”Done” to safely eject the cable and update the device.
Long tap on map to drop a pin for desired postion
Add up to 50 segments to My Segments to compete on devices
Please make sure your network is working.
Please make sure the smartphone is connected to the device. Select the “BRYTON” root folder to allow Bryton Active app gets permission to access the device for downloading new firmware.
New users will no longer be able to create new Bryton Active accounts using the Facebook or Strava sign up option. To create an account, please use the sign up with email option above
No ride activities. Record a new ride with your Rider device and sync activities to Active.
No results found. Drop a pin on another location.
Please ensure your GPS device is powered on and nearby
No Device Paired. Pair a Bryton RIDER to easily set up data pages, notifications, Live Track and activity auto sync.
No Notifications Yet! Check this section for updates, general notifications and official announcement.
No results found. Change another keyword.
No Workouts! Create a new workout or sync workout from 3rd party platforms.
The training workout description may be slightly adjusted for display on the Bryton device.
"This workout has more than 80 steps. It's not supported on Bryton devices."
Enable Nolio Sync to start your setup!

Bryton Active app works seamlessly with Nolio. After simple setup, activities you record on your Bryton device can be synced to Nolio automatically. And compatible workouts planned on Nolio will be synced to your Bryton acoount.

"*Activities uploaded to Bryton Active App before connecting Nolio and Bryton Active App will not be synced automatically. *Only cycling type workouts will be synced to Bryton. *Only workouts with less than 80 steps are compatible and can be synced to devices. *Due to compatibiity, some workout descriptions may be slightly adjusted for display on the Bryton device."
Failed to load profile data due to the poor internet connection. Please check your internet connection and try again.
Enter settings to allow Notification Access for Bryton Active App?
Set up notifications for certain apps to decide what notifications you want to receive on the paired Bryton GPS bike computer.
Account does not exist. Do you want to sign up for a new Bryton account?

Purchase detailed surface sourcing by OpenTopoMap for a better navigation experience while riding. OpenTopoMap provides the topographical map layer for Bryton devices with hillshade, elevation maps, and contour lines.
The device will automatically jump to Map Page when the reroute function is activated when you’re off route.
Note: One device can only pair with one account at a time.
Please go to the system settings page to enable notification permissions and activate this feature.
"Your photo couldn't be used. (Photos should be saved as BMP, JPG or PNG files.)"
Your old password was entered incorrectly. Please enter it again.

Bryton Active needs your location data to enable the navigation, routes planning, and altitude calibration even when the app is running in the background. Please allow the app to access your location.
Bryton Active needs your location info to scan and add nearby devices to your account. Please allow the app to access your location.
Bryton Active need permission to access notifications to display the received messages to the connected Bryton devices. Please allow the app to grant notification access.
Bryton Active needs permission for floating windows to function properly. Please enable Draw over other apps in system settings.

When the device is connected, the Bryton Active app will continue running in the background. This is necessary for features such as smart notifications, activity auto sync, live tracking, and route explore.
Active needs more space to download the map. Please free up space by managing your storage in Settings
Uploading data requires photo and media authorization on your device. Please allow access to upload.
Plan a route beforehand and follow it later on the device
Failed to load contents of Route list.
Search for a location or choose from map

"The power curve is a key performance metric that illustrates your highest power output over different time durations. The gray background line represents your all-time personal bests, while the green line allows you to compare your current performance with your best results from the past 42 or 84 days.
This metric is especially useful for interval training, as it helps you set power-based targets. By aligning the duration of each interval with your maximum power output for that specific time range, you can establish realistic and achievable training goals.
To view the power curve in the Bryton Active app, make sure the following conditions are met:
∙ Your power meter must be paired with a compatible Bryton Rider device. ∙ Recent ride data must be recorded and saved to ensure the power curve is properly updated."
為了更加準確的紀錄您的騎乘數據 請確認您的基本資料。
The profile on the device and the app are different. Would you like to synchronize the settings with the device or the app?

Bryton has collaborated with several third-party fitness websites to simplify the process of syncing data from the Bryton Active app. Begin your journey by authorizing your third-party fitness accounts.
You can set up 10 quick replies here for effective use as well as on your GPS device during a riding trip.
You can use up to 30 characters per reply.
This feature is only available for Rider 10.
the routes on Ride with GPS will be automatically synced to the Bryton Active app.
Any routes with public visibility on Ride with GPS will be automatically synced within minutes.

By agreeing to enable Ride With GPS on your Bryton Active account, you agree to authorize Bryton to collect and store your Ride With GPS user and account information as well as related credentials, such as your username and password, in order to enable access this feature on your Bryton Active account.
Toggle off and on to restart the synchronization feature for %s and try again.
Loading device files, please wait a few minutes.
Enable Relive Sync for first time setup.
Your Bryton Active App works seamlessly with Relive; any activities will be synced with Bryton device and Relive automatically after quick setup.
*Activities uploaded to Bryton Active App prior to connecting Strava and Bryton Active App will not sync.
Are you sure you want to remove this sensor?

A password reset email has been sent to you. If you have not received the email, please check the Spam folder and confirm that the provided email address is correct. If the problem continues, please contact our customer service mailbox: support@brytonsport.com and someone will assist you.
Enable Ride With GPS Sync for first time setup.
Your Bryton Active App works seamlessly with Ride With GPS; any activities you plan on Ride With GPS can be synced with Bryton devices automatically after quick setup.
Please make sure to sign up with the same email address from your previous account.
You can find the saved workout in My workouts.
"Device UUID scan failed. 'Retry' to scan again or choose 'Manual Input' to enter the 16 digit device UUID number on the back of your device manually."

"If your Bryton device supports WLAN, you can add its UUID to your Bryton account by scanning the QR Code appears on your device.
r Go to your Bryton device (Settings>UUID) to get it."
Enter the city, location and street name
Fail to connect Bryton Active App to %s. Please try again.
You are now connected with %s, any activities uploaded to Bryton Active App will automatically sync to %s within minutes.
Enable %s Sync for first time setup.
Your Bryton Active App works seamlessly with %s; any activities you record with GPS on your Bryton device can be synced with %s automatically after quick setup.
Your Bryton Active App works seamlessly with %s; any activities you plan on %s can be synced with Bryton devices automatically after quick setup.
*Activities uploaded to Bryton Active App before connecting %s and Bryton Active App will not sync.
Your connection between Bryton Active App and %s has stopped, please re-enter your log-in info.
If you are unable to add device UUID to your account, please contact Bryton support: support@brytonsport.com with the above information.

"To correctly sync your data via WLAN, please pair your device with Bryton account.
r Settings > UUID"
Starting point: city+street+location or choose from map
Please wait until the process is complete
Your device have reached the limit of storage, please free up some space before updating maps.
Any activities you upload to the Bryton Active App or routes you plan & save on Strava will automatically sync within minutes.
Fail to connect Bryton Active App to Strava. Please try again.
You are now connected with STRAVA, any activities uploaded to Bryton Active App will automatically sync to STRAVA within minutes.
Enable STRAVA Auto Sync to start your setup!
Your Bryton Active App works seamlessly with STRAVA; any activities will be synced with Bryton device and Strava automatically after quick setup.
*Activities uploaded to Bryton Active App prior to connecting Strava and Bryton Active App will not sync.
Your connection between Bryton Active App and Strava has stopped, please re-enter your log-in info.
"A Bryton account %s is already paired with this device. Choose OK” to pair the device with this account. Choose Cancel” to cancel the process"
Any activities you upload to the Bryton Active App will automatically sync within minutes.
Synchronizing segment data in the device
Any activities you upload to the Bryton Active App or workout plans on TrainingPeaks will automatically sync within minutes.
Failed to download the %s FIT file
Failed to load Route list from %s
Failed to transform turn info of route, please try again later.
It has been a while since you last used Bryton Active, please log in again to continue using it.
Fail to connect Bryton Active App to TrainingPeaks. Please try again.
You are now connected with TrainingPeaks, any activities uploaded to Bryton Active App will automatically sync to TrainingPeaks within minutes.
Enable TrainingPeaks Sync for first time setup.
Your Bryton Active App works seamlessly with TrainingPeaks; any activities you record with GPS on your Bryton device can be synced with TrainingPeaks automatically after quick setup.
*Activities uploaded to Bryton Active App before connecting TrainingPeaks and Bryton Active App will not sync.
Your connection between Bryton Active App and TrainingPeaks has stopped, please re-enter your log-in info.
Your new trip was uploaded successfully.
When acquiring turn-by-turn info during route conversion, the route may be altered to conform with OSM planning metrics. If you do not prefer the outcome, the original route can be used instead.
Please turn on your Location Services in your phone settings before scanning for Bluetooth.
Connect the smartphone to your Bryton device using a data transfer cable and ensure system authorization to sync the ride activities.
Connect the smartphone to your Bryton device using a data transfer cable before syncing.
You’ll have to grant permission to the Bryton device by selecting the “BRYTON” root folder to allow synchronization for ride activities.
You can sync activities with cable now. Please go to Settings -> Sync with cable.
Please unplug cable first before return to the previous page.
The map download failed due to unstable network connection. Please check your internet connection and try again.
Please note that some applications do not support sharing .fit files
Unusual profile metrics detected. Review and update settings.

The connected Rider device is currently operating on older firmware version. Keep your Rider device at its best with the latest updates, ensuring top-notch performance and access to all the newest features.
Failed to upload files, please try again later.
"Please don't upload more than 10 files at one time."
The activities uploaded to the Bryton Active
New device firmware version is detected. Do you want to update now?
Are you sure you want to cancel firmware download?
Invalid UUID. Please check your 16 digit device UUID number on the back of your device and try again.
Unable to add UUID. Please check your internet connection and try again.
A Bryton account is already paired with this UUID. Please contact customer service for more information.

"VO2 Max represents the maximum capacity of your body to absorb and utilize oxygen during intense exercise and is a key indicator of cardiorespiratory endurance. A higher VO2 Max indicates that your body can transport and use more oxygen, allowing you to sustain better performance while cycling. VO2 Max helps you understand your cardiorespiratory fitness level and serves as an essential reference for tracking training effectiveness and fitness progress."

"VO2 Max estimation via the Bryton device requires the following conditions: A power meter and heart rate sensor. If both power and heart rate sensors are not connected simultaneously, the App will be unable to calculate or update VO2 Max. VO2 Max is not measured on every ride; calculation is only triggered during training rides of stable and sufficient intensity. It is recommended to maintain a stable sensor signal to ensure proper device function and connection, and avoid riding in a pack to prevent reduced wind resistance. Environmental factors may affect VO2 Max estimation; training in high temperatures or at high altitudes may cause fluctuations in VO2 Max readings. VO2 Max estimation is based on your height, weight, age, gender, and MHR. Please ensure your profile data is correct to improve estimation accuracy."
VO2 Max estimation is based on your height, weight, age, gender, and MHR. Please ensure your profile data is correct to improve estimation accuracy.

Bryton Active app wants to access your location all the time, please select Allow only while using the app for location access to ensure stability in using functions when connected to your Bryton device.
To change Rider 750 Voice Language settings using the Bryton Active app, please navigate on your Rider 750 device to: MENU > NAVIGATION SETTINGS > VOICE LANGUAGE and select “DECIDE BY APP“

"You've successfully created a new Bryton account. We will begen to tranfer your tracks from brytonsport.com or Bryton Sports App. It usually takes about 5 ~ 7 days for the transfer to complete. For more questions, please contact support@brytonsport.com."
Your Bryton Active App works seamlessly with %s.
Please check the message on the notification page if you find the activity you uploaded was recorded more than one year ago
Error! The file size must be greater than 0 and less than 30MB.

Or clicking the pencil icon to add POIs by distance.

You’re all up to date! When you get notifications they will show up here.
Please make sure the smartphone is connected to the device via USB cable.
If you leave this page, any unsaved changes will be lost.
Click “Location” and then “Calibrate“ to calibrate preset location.
This activity is corrupted, please contact support@brytonsport.com
Device is recording. Please stop recording to use this function.

Become a STRAVA premium user to enjoy STRAVA Live Segment feature.

“While the device is unable to get GPS signal, enable “Acquire GPS in the background“to allow Bryton Active to access your location as a start point in the background for navigation.“
2. In the \"download” folder, select \"Bryton Active” to import files. You will be able to see the route inside \"my route”.
2. Select \"Bryton Active” to import files. You will be able to see the route inside \"my route”.
There are activities that have not been uploaded to the Bryton Active cloud. If you log out without uploading, these files will be lost. Are you sure you would like to log out?
This activity has not been uploaded to the Bryton Active cloud. Do you want to upload manually?

To provide the best support with speedy resolution, we kindly ask you to describe your problem in as much detail as possible. We’re dedicated to getting you back on track and making your experience seamless.
Passwords are suggested to contain at least 8 characters.

To enhance user experience, Bryton launched a New App called Bryton Active. Before installing Bryton Active, please uninstall the original ”Bryton Active App”. Uninstalling the original app will not result in missing uploaded tracks, and the new Bryton Active App will keep all of your old data safe.
You must add at least 1 device to your account. To add devices later, please go to Settings > Device Manager
You can also click on the map to add POIs.
Turn on your device while using the app to enjoy its full range of features.
You focus on riding and we will take care of the rest! Our new app can automatically sync your tracks, calibrate altitude and check the firmware of your devices.
In Result”, you can find all of your activity records.
In Course”, you can plan trips and workouts, then download them to your device.
In Profile”, you can edit your personal data and link 3rd party accounts to your Bryton account.
In Settings”, you can remotely customize device settings easily. Click the device icon to manually sync your activity records.

・The Active app will be compatible with all of the same devices as the previous Bryton Active App from the time of launch. Some of the newly added features are available initially only for Rider 15neo, Rider 320, Rider 320, Rider 750, Rider S500, Rider S800 users and will roll out for older models shortly afterwards.
・Please unbind your device from your account and then re-pair it when you use Bryton Active for the first time. You can do this in device manager” under Settings”.
・Please forget all your Bryton devices pairing in your smartphone Bluetooth settings before starting to use the new Bryton Active App.
・For Rider 420/Rider 750, planned trip and workout will not be downloaded to the device via Data Sync” now. You can choose which tracks or workouts to download in Course”.
An active komoot Premium subscription is required to send routes to the device such as Bryton GPS computer. Please check your Komoot account status.
A confirmation link has been sent to
Failed to load the map, tap here to see more detail
Failed to load the map, please check your internet connection and try again
You must be logged in to do this.
You need to stop Group Ride before automatically uploading activities and calibrating altitude.
Would you like to update the firmware?
No plans.It’s a wonderful rest day!
No specific note for the group ride.
Please trun off all the paired sensors on Rider 420, then restart both the app and device to update firmware.
Bryton Active uses the original system mail app to share files. If this has been removed, please download and try again.
Share the group code to Invite friends to join now?
Share your real-time location and data including Current Speed, Ride/Trip Time, and Distance during a recorded activity with others.
You and your friends’ riding data/status will be tracked and shared with the group during the event.
Start recording to begin Live Track
Please stay on current page until the upload process is complete.
Please stop the Group Ride before using this function.
Sync workouts for the next 7 days.
Plans for the next 7 days are ready!
What seems to be the problem?
Could you tell us more about the issue?
STRAVA live segment is a feature only for premium users.
No segments are added to compete.

Unable to find the Bryton device
Unable to find the specified file
Select the “BRYTON“ folder to grant access for firmware update.
Failed to update the firmware, please try again later
Used to login with 3rd party account
Code 1 means ”Unable to acquire GPS location.” Please make sure the internet is working and you allow Bryton Active to access your location.

"Code 2 means ”No internet access for Bryton Active.” Please do not lock your screen while Bryton Active is running In the foreground. It's OK to lock the screen while Bryton Active is running in the background."
Code 3 means ”The internet connection is unstable.” Please try it again later.
Code 4 means ”The internet access is not available.” Please make sure the internet is working and stable.
Code 5 means ”The internet connection is unstable.” Please try it again later.
Code 6 means ”Google service is not available in this region”
Do you want to add this sensor ?
Suggest updating to Android 8.0 or later
Due to local firewall, some information data may not be provided by map data company. Please be aware of road status and safety.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Failed to delete the LiveTrack link automatically, please press End LiveTrack to remove the link.
Please go to My Workout to remove this workout.
Please ensure your email app is configured to share FIT files.
The first point is the starting point.
Turn on Bluetooth to allow “Bryton Active” to connect to the device
"If you can't find your device in the list or fail to connect, please go to phone setting and forgot the Bryton device in the Bluetooth list."
Do not support this FIT format. Only support fit files from Bryton
Do not support this GPX format. Only support GPX track.

Old version Bluetooth connection is detected. Please turn off the App and go to Bluetooth settings in your smartphone to forget your device. Reactivate Bluetooth and then click pair” when Bryton Active rebuilds a new Bluetooth connection.
Suggest updating to iOS 14 or later
The file already includes turn-by-turn navigation
"No web browser installed on device, can't open web page."

This app uses Mapbox Geofencing to detect your device’s presence in areas the app developer has defined. Only the app developer can see where those areas are. You have the option to disable Mapbox Geofencing, which may affect app functionality.
Allow this app to use Geofencing
You are helping to make OpenStreetMap and Mapbox maps better by contributing anonymous usage data.
Map compass. Activate to reset the map rotation to North.
Attribution must be enabled if you use data from sources that require it. See https://docs.mapbox.com/help/getting-started/attribution/ for more details.
The Mapbox logo wordmark must remain enabled in accordance with our Terms of Service. See https://www.mapbox.com/legal/tos for more details.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
Seems like you were pretty busy this month. Try to make time for a fun ride!
No plans for the next 7 days.
What are your plans for the day?
*You can also tap on the map to mark the point.
This app may not work correctly without the requested permissions.
This app may not work correctly without the requested permissions. Open the app settings screen to modify app permissions.
The file has been successfully uploaded to the cloud. Check this file in “My Route”.
The second one is the destination.
Download route to device for virtual ride
Transfer to file containing turn-by-turn info
When acquiring turn-by-turn info during route conversion, the route may be altered to conform with OSM planning metrics. If you do not prefer the outcome, the original route can be used instead.
There is a new software version available. Would you like to download and update the app now?
If there are waypoints on the route, input them in sequence.
The scheduled Group Ride will start in 15 mins, please make sure the device is connected to your phone.
